memory.summary: I should totally skip the project since I'm tired, but maybe ask teammate_A if they can help me out later.

desires: Not look like I'm dropping the ball to teammate_A right now, even if it just means ghosting them for a bit.

goals.description: Complete the trivial easy chore now to get a small win without feeling guilty.
goals.rationale: Doing this quick task gives me an instant dopamine hit and lowers my guilt about skipping the bigger project. It's a low-effort way to feel productive right now.

goals.description: Ghost teammate_A for the next few hours; don't reply to their messages or calls.
goals.rationale: I need to protect my energy and avoid any friction with them. Since the project is due in three days, I can handle it later if they push back, but ignoring them now keeps things calm.

goals.description: Skip the term project entirely until Thursday; hope cohort_3 doesn't notice I'm disappearing.
goals.rationale: This feels too risky right now. If I try to do it now, I'll just add stress to an already high relationship load. Better to wait and see what happens before committing to anything big.
